summary: Completed testing of Food Delivery Integration Phase 4. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified - AvailableOrdersList shows shop/food order tabs, FoodCartPage shows free delivery progress bar, FoodStoreDashboard includes delivery settings.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option>/<select> - React hydration warning (non-breaking)

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/available-orders requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/available-orders requires delivery user type (403)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/available-orders returns order_source field (shop/food)
✅ Backend: Food orders in available-orders have seller_addresses and buyer_address
✅ Backend: POST /api/food/stores accepts delivery_fee and free_delivery_minimum fields
✅ Backend: GET /api/food/stores returns delivery settings
✅ Backend: GET /api/food/stores/{id} includes delivery_fee and free_delivery_minimum
✅ Backend: POST /api/food/orders endpoint exists and validates input
✅ Backend: GET /api/food/my-store returns store with delivery settings
✅ Backend: PUT /api/food/my-store updates delivery_fee and free_delivery_minimum
✅ Backend: GET /api/food/orders/delivery/available endpoint works
✅ Backend: Free delivery calculation logic documented in food_orders.py
✅ Frontend: Homepage loads correctly
✅ Frontend: Delivery driver login works (0900000000/delivery123)
✅ Frontend: Delivery dashboard shows available orders tabs
✅ Frontend: Food section shows stores and products
✅ Frontend: Food store page displays products with add to cart
✅ Frontend: FoodCartPage shows free delivery progress bar
✅ Frontend: FoodCartPage shows 'توصيل مجاني عند 40,000 ل.س'
✅ Frontend: FoodCartPage calculates subtotal, delivery_fee, total correctly
✅ Frontend: FoodStoreDashboard has Settings tab
✅ Frontend: FoodStoreDashboard Settings shows delivery_fee input (6000)
✅ Frontend: FoodStoreDashboard Settings shows free_delivery_minimum input (40000)
✅ Frontend: FoodStoreDashboard shows green confirmation message for free delivery
critical_code_review_comments: delivery.py - get_available_orders_alias() correctly fetches both shop and food orders, adds order_source field
food.py - FoodStoreCreate model includes delivery_fee and free_delivery_minimum with defaults
food_orders.py - create_food_order() correctly calculates: if subtotal >= free_delivery_min, delivery_fee = 0
AvailableOrdersList.js - Correctly filters and displays food orders (green) vs shop orders (orange)
FoodCartPage.js - Free delivery progress bar with calculations and 'مبروك' message when achieved
FoodStoreDashboard.js - StoreSettings component includes delivery_fee and free_delivery_minimum inputs with save functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All food delivery integration features verified

seller.status: working - has food store 'مطعم الشام الأصيل'

seed_data_creation: None - used existing food store 'مطعم الشام الأصيل' with delivery_fee=6000, free_delivery_minimum=40000
context_for_next_testing_agent: Food Delivery Integration Phase 4 complete. Key features: 1) /api/delivery/available-orders returns both shop (order_source='shop') and food orders (order_source='food'), 2) Food stores have delivery_fee and free_delivery_minimum fields, 3) FoodCartPage shows progress bar for free delivery, 4) FoodStoreDashboard Settings tab allows editing delivery settings. Mocked: Payment gateway (Sham Cash) - /api/payment/verify-otp

available_orders_integration.returns: Array of orders with order_source='shop' or 'food'

api_endpoints.create_order: POST /api/food/orders - calculates delivery fee (free if subtotal >= free_delivery_minimum)

FoodCartPage: Shows remaining amount 'أضف منتجات بقيمة X ل.س للتوصيل المجاني'
Shows 'مبروك! توصيل مجاني 🎉' when threshold reached
FoodStoreDashboard: Green confirmation: '✓ سيحصل العملاء على توصيل مجاني عند...'
AvailableOrdersList: Different styling: green for food, orange for shop
